title: Zephyr: Missing LOADng implementation entirely
description: Python has loadng/ (633 LoC: cache.py, discovery.py, error.py, messages.py). Rust has loadng.rs (636 LoC) with codec + discovery state machine. Zephyr has no LOADng implementation at all. Reference: python/src/lichen/loadng/, rust/lichen-core/src/loadng.rs
close_reason: Implemented: Zephyr LOADng implementation with message codecs (RREQ/RREP/RERR), LRU route cache, duplicate suppression table, expanding ring discovery state machine, and RREQ/RREP processing. Added loadng.h (451 LoC), loadng.c (651 LoC), Kconfig, CMakeLists.txt updates, and 11 passing native codec tests.
